user_query.0: Download the MP-r2SCAN dataset from the link https://doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.28245650.v2, and then give me the total number of frame ids and the mean of energy per atom. Return in a list in the order of number of frame ids and mean of energy per atom. You can use requests.get with the url https://figshare.com/ndownloader/files/51832613 to download the json file which has the structure of {mp-id: {frame-id: {energy_per_atom: ... } } }.
user_query.1: Download the MP-r2SCAN dataset from the link https://doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.28245650.v2, and then give me the total number of frame ids and the mean of energy per atom. Return in a list in the order of number of frame ids and mean of energy per atom.
